description:
Instantly see your current & past network activity. Detect malware, & block badly behaving apps.

GlassWire is a free network monitor & security tool with a built in firewall.

Use GlassWire's simple to use interface to view all your past and present network activity on a graph.
Click the graph to see what applications initiated the incoming or outgoing bandwidth and instantly see what hosts the applications were communicating with.
Hosts are automatically resolved and also include their country of origin.
Click the Apps and Traffic options to break down network activity by applications and traffic types.

Is your network feeling slow? Maybe your neighbor is logged on to your WiFi and watching Netflix. See a list of devices on the network and get alerted when devices join or leave with our new network device list feature.
